title: Fix SubscriptionProvider missing from guest flow causing crash

requirements.text: Ensure the SubscriptionProvider wraps the entire application component tree in App.tsx (or at the highest possible level above all routes) so that every route — including the guest flow entered via 'Continue as Guest' — has access to the subscription context. Any component calling useSubscriptionContext must never encounter a missing provider, eliminating the runtime error 'useSubscriptionContext must be used within SubscriptionProvider'.

quotes: useSubscriptionContext must be used within SubscriptionProvider

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Continue as Guest' on the LoginPage no longer throws 'useSubscriptionContext must be used within SubscriptionProvider'.
All routes (Dashboard, FocusMode, ProgressTracking, ExamSetup, Settings) render without subscription context errors for both guest and authenticated users.
SubscriptionProvider is placed in App.tsx or equivalent root-level file, wrapping all route definitions.
Authenticated user flow continues to work correctly with no regression in subscription state.

constraints: Do not modify files listed under frontend.immutablePaths (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui).
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
nonGoals: Implementing new subscription features or changing subscription business logic.
